S.FORM: Gene Banks sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1959, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 5, Gene Banks, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: …£ene ő≤anks~…ē s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, …£ene ő≤anks~…ē, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
